title: Milestone Travel Mug 40oz Tumbler with Straw, Handle & Lid/Large Capacity Insulated Stainless Steel Travel Cup for Cold or Hot Drinks (Black)
features: LARGE CAPACITY TUMBLER - With a large 40oz (1200ml) capacity, this tumbler reduces the need for constant refills. Enjoy dual drinking modes - sip through the removable straw or drink directly from the multi-functional 360° rotary lid for ultimate convenience.

SUPERIOR INSULATION - Constructed with durable stainless steel, the tumbler keeps your drinks at the perfect temperature for hours. Double-walled insulation keeps drinks cold for up to 24 hours and hot for up to 10 hours. Whether it's a refreshing iced beverage or a warm coffee, enjoy your drink of choice wherever you go.

TRAVEL READY DESIGN - Designed with a comfortable silicone handle for easy carrying, this tumbler is ideal for your active lifestyle. Plus, it’s cupholder-friendly, making it perfect for commuting, road trips, or outdoor adventures. The tumbler comes in six stylish colours: evergreen, black, pebble, mint green, pink and white.

DURABLE & EASY TO CLEAN - Made with a 305 stainless steel inner layer and 201 stainless steel outer layer, this tumbler is built to last. It’s also easy to clean, thanks to its removable straw and wide mouth opening, ensuring hassle-free maintenance.
MILESTONE CAMPING - Milestone Camping is the leading manufacturer of everything you need to enjoy the great outdoors. Visit the Milestone Camping page on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description 6 Colours Drink Tumbler Stay refreshed with this versatile 40oz tumbler, perfect for hot and cold beverages. Its large capacity, dual drinking options, and superior insulation make it an ideal companion for daily use, whether you're at the office, gym, or on the road. Constructed with durable stainless steel, this tumbler keeps your drinks cold or hot all day. With its comfortable handle, removable straw, and cup-holder-friendly design, this reusable tumbler is built to last. Previous page Superior Insulation The tumbler keeps your drinks cold for up to 24 hours and hot for up to 10 hours. Ideal for Daily Use Featuring dual drinking modes & a large handle, this tumbler can become your go-to reusable bottle. 6 Colours Choose from six stylish colours: evergreen, black, pebble, mint green, pink and white.
